mncStamps.Description: Plugin of inserting title blocks in the drawing (as AutoCAD tables) according to normative documentation, with field support
mncStamps.FullDescription: Using the "Field" plugin allows you to add additional values to the document that you can insert into the title block in the form of fields. This allows you to change the values in the title block at once in all the title blocks throughout the document
mncStamps.h12: Brief description (reference to the title block in the normative document)
mncStamps.h14: Inserting a title block with Top-left binding
mncStamps.h15: Inserting a title block with Top-right binding
mncStamps.h16: Inserting a title block with Bottom-left binding
mncStamps.h17: Inserting a title block with Bottom-right binding
mncStamps.h28: Specify a dwg file as a logo
mncStamps.h32: Edit the list of user posts
mncStamps.h39: The height of the text in all cells of the title block. The default is 2.5, which corresponds to ESKD GOST 2.304-81 "Drawing fonts"
mncStamps.h40: Additional text height. It is installed in such cells as "Document designation", "Stage", "Sheet", etc., which gives the title block expressiveness and readability. The default is 3.5, which corresponds to ESKD GOST 2.304-81 "Drawing fonts"
mncStamps.h41: Specify the block defined in this drawing to insert it into the title block as a logo
mncStamps.h42: The specified dwg-file will be added to the current drawing in the form of a block, which will be inserted into the title block as a logo. The file name will be the file name. If a block with this name already exists in the current drawing, the block from the drawing will be used
mncStamps.h62: Add completed fields to the drawing
mncStamps.h64: Load and set the field values from the specified dwg file
mncStamps.h71: Get the value from the drawing
mncStamps.h75: You can use line breaks in boxes 2,3 and 9. To add line breaks use Enter
mncStamps.h77: Date is added if there is a surname in the line
mncStamps.h78: The width factor for the field that is inserted into the stamp. The width factor will be applied directly to the inserted field, regardless of the width factor set in the text style. Valid values are from 0.01 to 100.0. In order not to change the width factor, specify the value 0
mncStamps.h87: Enabling or disabling the use of signature
mncStamps.h92: The specified file was not found!
mncStamps.h99: The signature is inserted in the lower left corner of the cell to the right of the cell with the surname. The scale of tables (title blocks) is not taken into account!
mncStamps.h101: Copy layout name into the title block
mncStamps.h102: You can zoom the image using the mouse wheel, pan while holding down the left mouse button and fit the image by pressing the right mouse button
mncStamps.msg1: The configuration file is corrupt!\nRun the ModPlus Configurator
mncStamps.msg4: already contained in the list of standard values
mncStamps.msg5: The list contains the same values!
mncStamps.msg6: Filled values updated in the current drawing\nDo not forget to call regeneration to update the values in the title blocks
mncStamps.msg7: Filled values added to the drawing
mncStamps.msg10: Wrong choice! This is not a title block!
mncStamps.msg11: Specify the object to retrieve the text (text, multileader, table):
mncStamps.msg16: File was created in a later version of AutoCAD!
mncStamps.msg17: Could not copy file to disk!\nThere may be no administrator rights
mncStamps.msg18: Could not copy table from resource file
mncStamps.msg19: You can not add more than
mncStamps.msg21: The title block does not correspond to the title block ModPlus!\nInvalid number of cells
mncStamps.msg22: The "Organization" cell contains a logo\nReplace on field?
mncStamps.msg26: At the moment, the area for working with the tag "{0}" is selected, and the tag "{1}" is specified in the loading file.\nDo you want to continue loading?
mncStamps.msg27: The selected file is not a field storage file
mncStamps.msg28: There are no more than three signatures available in the free version!
mncStamps.msg29: There are no labels available to insert into the title block!
mncStamps.msg30: There are no signatures in the list!
mncStamps.msg31: The selected file is not a signature storage file!
